summary: Coast Guard footage filmed on the deck of a cutter in port. Crew members in uniform move bales and gear along the deck and through a hatch, and several men in civilian clothes are escorted along the deck. The audio is a music bed with no speech. The tweet text describes a cocaine offload and the transfer of suspected smugglers to federal authorities.

script.scene: Coast Guard crew on a cutter deck move bales and gear through a hatch while several men in civilian clothes are escorted along the deck.
